post.description: Call a JSON-RPC method. The method must exist (see /api/v4/methods).

Dry-run an RPC call to infer and store input/output types. Dry-runs do not modify the database. 
        Run this before requesting TypeScript types from /api/v4/interfaces.

requestBody.description: Fields to update. Partial update is allowed.

post.description: Commit schema changes to Git and push to the remote repository.

get.description: Check if event trigger is enabled.

post.description: Upload file(s) via multipart/form-data and stage them on the server.
Import a staged file into a target schema/table. Supports dry-run, append, SRS, and more.

post.summary:
GraphQL POST endpoint.
Accepts a JSON body: { "query": string, "variables": object|null }
post.description: Run a GraphQL query or mutation.

unique.description: If the index has a unique constraint
If the index has a unique constraint

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Schema-qualified relation name, schema name, or tag (tag:name). Comma-separated values are supported.

get.description: Get TypeScript interfaces for RPC methods inferred from /api/v4/call/dry.

parameters.name: namesOnly
parameters.description: Return only schema names (omit tables and sequences).

500.description: Internal error. Most likely an SQL error.

post.description: Run SQL statements without a token.

500.description: Internal error. Most likely an SQL error.

parameters.name: namesOnly
parameters.description: Return only table names (omit columns, indexes, constraints, and other details).

schema.description: Target schema to move the table to.

comment.title: Comment
comment.example: This is a comment on the table

Call.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 request payload. Used to call a named RPC method with optional parameters.

jsonrpc.title: JSON RPC version
jsonrpc.description: The version number of the JSON-RPC protocol. Must be exactly "2.0".

id.title: Identifier
id.description: Client-supplied request id. If present, must be a string.

method.title: Method name
method.description: Name of the RPC method to call.

params.title: Parameters
params.description: Parameters for the method. For SELECT methods, only one parameter set is allowed.

Client.description: OAuth client definition used to request and manage user access.

homepage.title: Homepage
homepage.description: Homepage or web app URL that starts the code flow.

description.title: Description
description.description: Longer description to identify the client.

redirect_uri.title: Redirect URIs.
redirect_uri.description: Allowed redirect URIs for this client.

public.title: Public
public.description: Public clients do not require a secret.

confirm.title: Confirm
confirm.description: Require user confirmation before granting access.

allow_signup.title: Allow users to sign up
allow_signup.description: Allow users to sign up in the web dialog.

Column.description: Table column definition, including name, data type, nullability, defaults, identity, and comment.

type.title: Type
type.description: Column type, e.g. varchar, integer, boolean. Array types use [] (e.g. varchar[]).

is_nullable.title: Is nullable
is_nullable.description: Whether the column allows NULL values.

default_value.title: Default value
default_value.description: Default value used when no value is provided.

identity_generation.title: Identity generation of the column
identity_generation.description: Identity generation mode for auto-generated values.

comment.title: Comment
comment.example: This is a comment on the column

Commit.description: Commit schema metadata and table definitions to a Git repository.

schema.title: Schema
schema.description: Schema name to export and commit.

meta_query.title: Meta query string
meta_query.description: Only include meta entries that match this search query.

Constraint.description: Table constraint definition (primary key, foreign key, unique, or check).

referenced_table.title: Referenced table
referenced_table.description: Referenced table for a foreign key constraint.

referenced_columns.title: Referenced columns
referenced_columns.description: Referenced columns for a foreign key. Defaults to the referenced table's primary key.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Enable or disable events for this table.

FileProcessRequest.description: Upload files to temporary storage and then import them into database tables.

import.title: Import
import.description: If false, run a dry-run (no changes).

t_srs.title: Target srs
t_srs.description: Fallback target SRS. Used if no authority name/code is available.

s_srs.title: Source srs
s_srs.description: Fallback source SRS. Used if the file has no projection information.

append.title: Append
append.description: Append to an existing table instead of creating a new one.

truncate.title: Truncate
truncate.description: Truncate table before appending. Only applies when append is true.

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: Name of timestamp field to create. Omit to skip creating a timestamp field.

x_possible_names.title: Possible names for X
x_possible_names.description: Possible column names for X/longitude (CSV only).

y_possible_names.title: Possible names for Y
y_possible_names.description: Possible column names for Y/latitude (CSV only).

FileProcessResponse.description: Upload files to temporary storage and then import them into database tables.

geom_type.title: Geometry type
geom_type.description: Type of geometry if PostGIS table is created.

index.title: Index
index.description: Index of multi layered geometry files like GML and GeoPackage

has_wkt.title: Has WKT
has_wkt.description: If file has WKT projection information.

Rule.description: Access-control rules applied to incoming SQL before execution (allow, deny, or limit via WHERE clause).

id.title: Unique identifier
id.description: Rule id. If omitted, an id is generated.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Rules are evaluated by priority (highest first). First match is applied.

GraphQL.description: GraphQL request payload for the limited GraphQL endpoint backed by database metadata.

query.title: Query
query.description: GraphQL query string. Queries read data; mutations modify data.

variables.title: Variables
variables.description: Variables object for the GraphQL query.

operationName.title: Operation name
operationName.description: Operation name to execute when the document contains multiple operations.

Index.description: Database indexes speed up lookups by keeping an ordered structure over one or more columns.

columns.title: Columns
columns.description: Column(s) to include in the index.

Meta.description: Metadata for relations (tables/views) used by clients and tools. Stored outside the physical schema.

relations.description:
Relation metadata provides supplementary information about database relations.
            Metadata is stored outside the physical schema and does not change table structure or constraints.
            It is used by clients such as UI applications, query builders, and access layers.

abstract.description: Description or summary of the relation.

queryable.description: Whether the field can be queried/filtered.

sort_id.description: Sorting weight within the field list.

Method.description: Define reusable JSON-RPC methods that wrap SQL statements plus optional type hints and output formats.

method.title: Method
method.description: Name of the method to create.

q.title: Query
q.description: SQL statement. Allowed: SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, MERGE.

type_hints.title: Type hints
type_hints.description: Type hints for JSON-encoded parameters that are not JSON in the database.

type_formats.title: Type formats
type_formats.description: Formatting rules for typed parameters, e.g. date formats.

srs.title: Spatial reference system
srs.description: EPSG code for the spatial reference system used for geometry output.

OAuth.description: OAuth token request payload for supported grant types.

username.title: Username
username.description: Username (database user or sub-user). Used only with password grant.

database.title: Database
database.description: Database name the user belongs to.

code.title: Code
code.description: Authorization code exchanged for tokens (authorization_code grant).

OAuthDeviceResponse.description: Device flow response with user code and verification URI.

user_code.title: User code
user_code.description: User code to show to the user.

verification_uri.title: Verification uri
verification_uri.description: Verification URI where the user completes authorization.

Privilege.description: Privileges define read/write access for sub-users on tables.

privilege.title: Privilege
privilege.description: Privilege level for the sub-user on the table.

Schema.description: Schema definition, including tables and sequences.

Sequence.description: Sequence definition for generating incremental numeric values.

data_type.title: Data type
data_type.description: Data type used by the sequence.

increment_by.title: Increment by
increment_by.description: Value added to the current sequence value to create a new value.

min_value.title: Min value
min_value.description: Minimum value the sequence can generate.

max_value.title: Max value
max_value.description: Maximum value the sequence can generate.

start_value.title: Start value
start_value.description: The initial value of the sequence

cache_size.title: Cache size
cache_size.description: How many sequence numbers to preallocate and cache.

owned_by.title: Owned by
owned_by.description: Associates the sequence with a table column so it is dropped with that column/table. Format: schema.table.column.

Sql.description: Execute SQL statements. Supports SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, and MERGE (no DDL or transaction control).

q.title: Query
q.description: SQL statement to run. Allowed: SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, MERGE. Not allowed: DDL, transaction control.

params.title: Parameters
params.description: Parameters for the statement. For SELECT, only one parameter set is allowed.

type_hints.title: Type hints
type_hints.description: Type hints for JSON-encoded parameters that are not JSON/JSONB in the database.

type_formats.title: Type formats
type_formats.description: Formatting rules for typed parameters, e.g. date formats.

output_format.title: Output format
output_format.description: Output format. Supported: json, geojson, csv, ccsv, ndjson, excel, or ogr/<format> (e.g. ogr/ESRI Shape). ccsv and ndjson are streamed.

srs.title: Spatial reference system
srs.description: EPSG code for the spatial reference system used for PostGIS geometry output.

Stats.description: Database-level statistics, including sizes and per-table stats.

total_size.title: Total size
total_size.description: Total size of all tables in bytes.

total_size_bytes.title: Total size
total_size_bytes.description: Total size of all tables in human-readable format.

number_of_tables.title: Number of tables
number_of_tables.description: Number of tables in the database.

cost.title: Cost of queries
cost.description: Aggregate cost of queries (as reported by the database).

total_size.title: Total size
total_size.description: Total size of the table including indexes, human-readable.

total_size_bytes.title: Total size in bytes
total_size_bytes.description: The total size of the table including indices in bytes.

table_size.title: Table size
table_size.description: The size of the table in human-readable format.

table_size_bytes.title: Table size in bytes
table_size_bytes.description: The size of the table in bytes.

indices_size.title: Indices size
indices_size.description: Size of the table's indexes, human-readable.

indices_size_bytes.title: Indices size
indices_size_bytes.description: The size of the table's indices in bytes.

row_count.title: Row count
row_count.description: The number of rows in the table.

Table.description: Table definition including columns, indexes, constraints, and comments.

comment.title: Comment
comment.example: This is a comment on the table

User.description: Sub-users are API users managed under a super-user and can be granted specific database privileges.

password.title: Password
password.description: User password. Minimum 8 characters with at least one uppercase letter and one number.

properties.title: Properties
properties.description: Arbitrary custom properties for the user.

default_user.title: Is default user
default_user.description: Whether this is the default user when no token is provided (public access).
